zh.Astley, Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Blount於1487年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾斯利時，他的父親Thomas Blount42歲，母親Anne Croft29歲。他於大約1512年與Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾阿克頓 白 德洛特維其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1561年10月3日在他的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾諾斯 馬爾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Blount于1487年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾斯利时，他的父亲Thomas Blount42岁，母亲Anne Croft29岁。他于大约1512年与Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾阿克頓 白 德洛特維其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1561年10月3日在他的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾諾斯 馬爾福。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Blount was born in 1487, in Astley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Blount, was 42 and his mother, Anne Croft, was 29. He married Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton about 1512, in Acton by Droitwich, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 3 October 1561, in his hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in North Malvern, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Acton, Worcestershire, England: Acton by Droitwich, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Blount est né en 1487, à Astley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Blount, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Anne Croft, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton environ 1512, à Acton by Droitwich, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1561, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à North Malvern, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1512 in Acton by Droitwich, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1561 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in North Malvern, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton circa 1512, nel Acton by Droitwich, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Blountが1487年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアアストリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Blountは42歳，母Anne Croftは29歳であった。約1512年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアアクトン ビー ドロイトウィチでElizabeth Margaret Isabel Actonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1561年10月3日に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノース マルバーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Acton, Worcestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 악턴 비 드로이트위치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Blount(이)가 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Blount(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Croft(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 악턴 비 드로이트위치에서 Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1561년 10월 3일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 노르스 맬버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Blount nasceu em 1487, em Astley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Blount, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Anne Croft, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton aproximadamente 1512, em Acton by Droitwich, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1561, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em North Malvern, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Acton, Worcestershire, England: актон би дроитвич, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Blount родился в 1487 г. в местности астли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Blount было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Croft, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton около 1512 г. в местности актон би дроитвич, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 3 октября 1561 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности норт малвирн, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton aproximadamente 1512, en Acton by Droitwich, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas.
